subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-04-07 in Abu Sinan
subcodes.first_line: These hapless souls wander astray, and know not why they sacrifice their very lives unto the dust [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این بیچاره های مردم گشته میشوند و نمیدانند برای چه جانهای خود را فدای خاک میکنند
subcodes.subjects: @transcending the material condition, @spiritual transformation, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @station of the Manifestation of God, @martyrs and martyrdom
